name: Non-exit on Failed Initialization
description: The product does not exit or otherwise modify its operation when security-relevant errors occur during initialization, such as configuration file format errors or hardware security module activation failures. This can cause the application to execute in a less secure mode than intended.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL initialization node encounters an error condition but the CONTROL flow continues to normal operation instead of terminating or entering a safe state. Look for initialization paths where a CONTROL(error_check) node is missing or does not route to an EGRESS(exit) or CONTROL(safe_mode) node on failure.
